[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0110000000 2
1 0000000000 a
2 0110001000 3
3 0000000000 a
4 0000000000 a
5 0000000000 a
6 0110000000 2
7 0100000000 1

01 10 0000000000 a match 1 3 4 5
12 21 0100000001 2
23 32 0000000011 2
34 43 0000001010 2
45 54 0110000000 2 match 0 6
56 65 0110000000 2 match 0 6
67 76 0110000000 2 match 0 6
70 07 0000000000 a match 1 3 4 5

02 20 0000000000 a match 1 3 4 5
13 31 0000001001 2
24 42 0100010010 3
35 53 0000100100 2
46 64 0110000000 2 match 0 6
57 75 0110000000 2 match 0 6
60 06 0000000000 a match 1 3 4 5
71 17 0110001000 3 match 2

03 30 0000100000 1
14 41 0110001000 3 match 2
25 52 0100000000 1 match 7
36 63 0001000000 1
47 74 0110001000 3 match 2
50 05 1000100000 2
61 16 0110000000 2 match 0 6
72 27 0100000000 1 match 7

04 40 0000000000 a match 1 3 4 5
15 51 0110000000 2 match 0 6
26 62 0100000000 1 match 7
37 73 0000001000 1
